prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY. Drawn on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel is one clean flat square block with no smaller detail, smooth gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, or dithering. A single centered Fowl Harvest Equipment item in three-quarter display angle for Augerwire Longbow: a compact industrial longbow with a thick storm-slate auger spine (exact gray-blue #55586a blocks only) and a coiled pond-teal / diner-teal wire string (greenish teal #146451 and #1f9277 only — NEVER blue-cyan, NEVER purple). Selective oil-ink #111018 outline. Leave at least three full magenta cells clearance on every edge so recovered height stays under 30. Subject long side about 24–28 logical pixels. Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background, nothing else in frame. Use only named fowl-harvest-24 colors, 8–12 flat colors maximum. Structural members are at least three logical pixels thick. No Character, duck body, scene, shadow, glow, sparks, particles, text, watermark, UI frame, or transparency.
note: Accepted provider raw for #397; unregistered interim source.
